title: hitl-prompt/v1 response envelope
description: Schema for the value attached at Message.metadata['hitl_response_for'] when a client supplies the answer to a prior prompt envelope. See spec.md.

prompt_id.description: RFC 4122 UUID matching the prompt_id from the prompt envelope being answered.

payload.description: User-supplied response object. MUST validate against the response_schema carried in the corresponding prompt envelope. The agent re-validates on receipt; an invalid payload yields HTTP 422 / JSON-RPC -32011.
